rationale: Gov't Code §2001.052 governs notice contents for contested case hearings. It is a general procedural rule unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict arises.
quote: Sec. 2001.052. CONTENTS OF NOTICE. (a) Notice of a hearing in a contested case must include:
_note: The rule is purely procedural (administrative hearing notice requirements) and has no substantive relationship to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
